scripts.dev:tailscale: pnpm infra:up && node scripts/with-tailscale-origins.mjs turbo run dev
scripts.dev:docker:tailscale: pnpm bootstrap && node scripts/with-tailscale-origins.mjs docker compose up --build
scripts.infra:up: pnpm bootstrap && docker compose up -d sobrebox-db sobrebox-redis sobrebox-mailpit sobrebox-rustfs
scripts.infra:up:logs: pnpm bootstrap && docker compose up sobrebox-db sobrebox-redis sobrebox-mailpit sobrebox-rustfs
scripts.db:shell: docker compose exec sobrebox-db psql -U sobrebox -d sobrebox
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm bootstrap && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @sobrebox/api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:deploy: pnpm bootstrap && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @sobrebox/api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: pnpm bootstrap && pnpm build:shared && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @sobrebox/api run seed
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm bootstrap && pnpm build:shared && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @sobrebox/api run test:e2e
